narrative: A Search Engineer at Netflix with six years of experience, coming from a product‑first environment, brings solid expertise in building large‑scale search systems. Strong demonstrated expertise in search technologies was the main factor lifting his ranking. His work with machine‑learning models, the Milvus vector database, and QLoRA fine‑tuning directly matches the core requirements for a senior AI/ML role focused on retrieval. Additionally, his background at a leading product company aligns well with the team’s delivery mindset. However, his current location in Austin and an unknown notice period create a logistical mismatch for the Pune/Noida office, and minor credibility flags temper confidence in his profile.
